summary: Excellent audience recording captures a blistering show highlighted by a smoking Wheel > Other One > Truckin sequence and an epic Althea.
review: The crowd‑sourced tape is praised for its vivid, authentic sound that many reviewers say even surpasses the available soundboard in atmosphere. Musically the night erupts with a raging Wheel > Other One > Truckin medley and a standout Althea that fans describe as “all‑time best.” Overall the performance and recording are both rated at the top of the Dead catalog.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are 4–5 stars, emphasizing a superb live performance and an audience recording praised for its authenticity and clarity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the tape as vivid, immersive and “devastating” in a good way; no major drop‑outs or muddiness reported. Authentic crowd ambience is highlighted as a strength.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy first set leading into a blistering second half; the Wheel > Other One > Truckin sequence is cited as a peak, and Althea is praised as an unforgettable moment.
